source_notes: Bundled summary derived from AssemblyAI documentation current as of 2026-03-14.
Use raw --config / --request fields if AssemblyAI adds new parameters before this skill is updated.

speech_models.summary: Highest-accuracy pre-recorded STT model in AssemblyAI docs, with advanced prompting, larger keyterm limits, and built-in code switching across its supported languages.
recommended_when: You want the highest documented accuracy
You need keyterms prompting at larger scale
You are transcribing English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, or Portuguese
speech_models.supported_languages_note: Supported across 6 language families: English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, including major regional variants.
language_families: Spanish: Castilian, Mexican, Argentine, Colombian, Chilean, Caribbean, Spanglish
speech_models.prompting: Documented prompt support up to 1,500 words
features: topic / key phrase / entity / sentiment tasks

speech_models.summary: Wide-coverage pre-recorded STT model with 99-language support and documented automatic language detection.
recommended_when: You are routing as a fallback behind Universal-3-Pro
You need AssemblyAI support for languages outside U3 Pro coverage
speech_models.supported_languages_note: 99-language coverage across high/good/moderate/fair accuracy bands in AssemblyAI docs.
features: code switching via language detection options
topic / key phrase / entity / sentiment tasks

routing_recipes.name: Best general default
routing_recipes.description: Route to Universal-3-Pro for supported languages and fall back to Universal-2 elsewhere.

routing_recipes.name: Known U3 language
routing_recipes.description: Use a single U3 Pro request when you already know the language is covered.

routing_recipes.name: Meeting / interview with named speakers
routing_recipes.description: Diarise, then ask AssemblyAI to map generic speakers to names or roles.

llm_gateway.summary: AssemblyAI LLM Gateway provides a unified chat completions interface and structured outputs. EU LLM Gateway supports Claude and Gemini families; OpenAI models are documented on the US gateway.
notes: Summarisation fields on the transcription API are deprecated; use LLM Gateway instead.
The gateway only sees the text you send it, so this skill can format speaker-aware transcript text before calling it.
